summary: Frontend-only regression + new-features test for Cortona Francesca static art site. Verified navbar (6 items), new /mostre and /7-chakra pages with all data-testids, home CV section with 6 cv-items and downloadable PDF, home-chakra-link replacing OpenSea, footer links, arcani & opere WebP images load (naturalWidth>0). All checks pass. No external OpenSea/redirect links present on Home or /7-chakra as explicitly required by the user.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In Mostre.jsx, individual Reveal wrappers inside sections initialise with opacity:0 which caused Playwright is_visible() to report parent sections as not visible until viewport intersection - not a bug, just a test-side quirk to be aware of. Content is fully rendered in the DOM and children query correctly.
Static site with no backend - clean separation, all data centralised in src/data/extra.js which is good.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All checks executed against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Verified: (1) navbar 6 items - nav-home/arcani/opere/mostre/chakra/contatti all visible; (2) /mostre h1='MOSTRE & CRITICA', critica-section (3 blockquotes), premi-section (3 items incl. Miami/Milano/Sgarbi), mostre-section (6 timeline items), pubblicazioni-section (6 items); (3) /7-chakra h1='7 CHAKRA' + 'Connection', chakra-intro, chakra-list with chakra-1..chakra-7, chakra-humanitarian - ZERO opensea mentions and ZERO external http links inside chakra-page; (4) Home cv-section present with cv-item-0..5, cv-download has href='/cv-francesca-cortona.pdf' and download attribute; (5) home-chakra-link href='/7-chakra' navigates correctly; (6) Footer contains /mostre and /7-chakra links; (7) Regression: /arcani shows 22 arcano-*.webp with naturalWidth 819-831; /opere loads with WebP images naturalWidth>0.
